languages.text: {n}Холодный воздух вокруг пронизан запахом медикаментов и стонами боли. Две фигуры склонились над прикованным к операционному столу пациентом с окровавленной головой. К столу упорно пытается прорваться женщина в военной форме.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Прохладу вокруг пронизывают звяканье железа и стоны боли, из глубины отсека слышны громкие голоса. Ассистирующий сервочереп с тихим гудением ведет вас к эпицентру шума, а затем неуверенно останавливается, разрываемый конфликтом внутренних команд. Прямо на ваших глазах двое специалистов склонились над пациентом с наполовину спиленным черепом. Руки в белых перчатках и блестящие механодендриты двигаются в завораживающем кровавом танце.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The smell of medical supplies and weak cries of pain fill the cold air. Two figures stand over an operating table — the patient lying upon it is bound in place, and his head is soaked in blood. A woman in uniform is desperately trying to force her way to the table.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Холодный воздух вокруг пронизан запахом медикаментов и стонами боли. Две фигуры склонились над прикованным к операционному столу пациентом с окровавленной головой. К столу упорно пытается прорваться женщина в военной форме.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}The smell of medical supplies and weak cries of pain fill the cold air. Two figures stand over an operating table — the patient lying upon it is bound in place and his head is soaked in blood. A woman in uniform is desperately trying to force her way to the table.{/n}

{n}The smell of medical supplies and weak cries of pain fill the cold air. Two figures stand over an operating table — the patient lying upon it is bound in place, and his head is soaked in blood. A woman in uniform is desperately trying to force her way to the table.{/n}
{n}Clinking metal and groans of pain pierce the cool reigning silence. Two people stand over a bed — the maimed patient within is bound in place and his skull has been opened.{/n}

{n}The smell of medical supplies and weak cries of pain fill the cold air. Two figures stand over an operating table — the patient lying upon it is bound in place and his head is soaked in blood. A woman in uniform is desperately trying to force her way to the table.{/n}

{n}Clinking metal and groans of pain pierce the cool reigning silence. Two people stand over an operating table — the wretched patient lying upon it is bound in place and his skull has been opened. A woman in uniform is desperately trying to force her way to the table.{/n}

{n}The smell of medical supplies and weak cries of pain fill the cold air. Two figures stand over an operating table — the patient lying upon it is bound in place, and his head is soaked in blood. A woman in uniform is desperately trying to force her way to the table.{/n}

languages.text: {n}冷ややかな静寂を、金属の触れ合う音と苦痛のうめきが切り裂く。ベッドに身を乗り出す者が二人――その上に横たわる損なわれた患者は縛り付けられ、頭蓋は開かれている。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Clinking metal and groans of pain pierce the cool reigning silence. Two people stand over a bed — the maimed patient within is bound in place and his skull has been opened.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}冷ややかな静寂を、金属の触れ合う音と苦痛のうめきが切り裂く。ベッドに身を乗り出す者が二人――その上に横たわる損なわれた患者は縛り付けられ、頭蓋は開かれている。{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'odeur des fournitures médicales et les gémissements de douleur emplissent l'atmosphère glaciale. Deux silhouettes se tiennent autour d'une table d'opération sur laquelle est attaché un patient, la tête ensanglantée. Une femme en uniforme tente désespérément de s'approcher.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The smell of medical supplies and weak cries of pain fill the cold air. Two figures stand over an operating table — the patient lying upon it is bound in place, and his head is soaked in blood. A woman in uniform is desperately trying to force her way to the table.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'odeur des fournitures médicales et les gémissements de douleur emplissent l'atmosphère glaciale. Deux silhouettes se tiennent autour d'une table d'opération sur laquelle est attaché un patient, la tête ensanglantée. Une femme en uniforme tente désespérément de s'approcher.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Tıbbi malzeme kokusu ve zayıf acı çığlıkları, soğuk havayı dolduruyor. İki figür, bir ameliyat masasının başında duruyor. Masada yatan hasta, sıkıca bağlanmış ve kafası kana bulanmış. Üniformalı bir kadın, çaresizce masaya ulaşmaya çalışıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The smell of medical supplies and weak cries of pain fill the cold air. Two figures stand over an operating table — the patient lying upon it is bound in place, and his head is soaked in blood. A woman in uniform is desperately trying to force her way to the table.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Tıbbi malzeme kokusu ve zayıf acı çığlıkları, soğuk havayı dolduruyor. İki figür, bir ameliyat masasının başında duruyor. Masada yatan hasta, sıkıca bağlanmış ve kafası kana bulanmış. Üniformalı bir kadın, çaresizce masaya ulaşmaya çalışıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die halte Luft ist vom Duft von Medikamenten und schwachen Schmerzensschreien erfüllt. Zwei Gestalten beugen sich über einen Operationstisch ... auf ihm liegt ein fixierter Patient mit einem blutüberströmten Kopf. Eine Frau in Uniform versucht verzweifelt, sich einen Weg an den Tisch zu bahnen.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The smell of medical supplies and weak cries of pain fill the cold air. Two figures stand over an operating table — the patient lying upon it is bound in place, and his head is soaked in blood. A woman in uniform is desperately trying to force her way to the table.{/n}

Eine Frau in Uniform versucht verzweifelt, sich einen Weg an den Tisch zu bahnen.{/n}

languages.text: {n}El olor a suministros médicos y los gemidos de dolor llenan el aire. Hay dos figuras sobre una mesa de operaciones. El paciente que la ocupa está atado y tiene la cabeza ensangrentada. Una mujer uniformada trata desesperadamente de abrirse paso hasta la mesa.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The smell of medical supplies and weak cries of pain fill the cold air. Two figures stand over an operating table — the patient lying upon it is bound in place, and his head is soaked in blood. A woman in uniform is desperately trying to force her way to the table.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}El olor a suministros médicos y los gemidos de dolor llenan el aire. Hay dos figuras sobre una mesa de operaciones. El paciente que la ocupa está atado y tiene la cabeza ensangrentada. Una mujer uniformada trata desesperadamente de abrirse paso hasta la mesa.{/n}

languages.text: {n}冰冷的空气中弥漫着医疗用品的气味和微弱的痛苦呻吟。两个身影伫立在手术台旁边——台上的病人被绑缚固定，头部浸透血污。一名身着制服的女人正拼命想挤到手术台前。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The smell of medical supplies and weak cries of pain fill the cold air. Two figures stand over an operating table — the patient lying upon it is bound in place, and his head is soaked in blood. A woman in uniform is desperately trying to force her way to the table.{/n}
